column1: # Partition table for the CatchChallenger ESP32 server (single big app
# The datapack + settings are compiled into the app image (.rodata)
# NO data/SPIFFS/littlefs partition — only NVS (wifi calibration) + the app.
# Right-sized to the MEASURED image: server + "test" maincode datapack-cpp =
# ~1.55 MiB. 0x1E0000 (1.875 MiB) leaves ~19% headroom AND fits in a 2 MiB flash

column2: so the same image runs on cheap 2 MiB ESP32s and on

column1: # 4 MiB boards alike. A bigger datapack needs a bigger flash + a bigger factory.
